criteria.name: Uses Gantt syntax
criteria.description: Uses Mermaid gantt syntax rather than a flowchart or timeline.

criteria.name: Includes schedule essentials
criteria.description: Includes the project start date, design review, implementation, QA, documentation, and release milestone.

criteria.name: Models dependencies
criteria.description: Shows implementation after design review, QA after implementation, documentation after implementation, and release after both QA and documentation are complete or clearly notes the limiting dependency.

criteria.name: Uses readable organization
criteria.description: Uses sections, concise task labels, and Mermaid-friendly dates/durations.

criteria.name: Assumptions note
criteria.description: Includes one short assumptions sentence outside the diagram.
